project.name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
project.currentFocus: Session 74 is closed out and pushed: the first visitor-intelligence layer now exists on top of the contract spine, with constrained pathways, related-content rails, startup snapshot tooling, live-header verification, and a safer local Worker deploy fallback all in-repo. The remaining focus is one clean browser verification pass plus deeper proof/instrumentation follow-through.
project.nextMilestone: Finish the runtime proof pass on top of the new pathway layer: complete one clean local or staging browser verify run, deepen conversion trust surfaces, and activate annual checkout once the Stripe annual plan keys exist.
blockers: CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN missing, so Worker deploys still require local Wrangler auth
Annual Stripe plan keys still do not exist, so annual checkout remains an honest preview only
This environment did not complete a clean local Playwright run for the new visitor-intelligence layer

now: [AUDIT] Expand local verification coverage — the `core` and `extended` local tiers now exist, but this environment still timed out on a clean Playwright pass; finish real local/browser execution once the runtime issue is cleared.

[SIL] Conversion telemetry matrix — extend the new pathway layer into shared stage-by-stage journey/form reporting so homepage, join, contact, invite, membership, and VaultSparked expose where intent strengthens or leaks.
[SIL] Trust-depth module for conversion pages — add reusable proof/outcome/objection-handling blocks so homepage, membership, and VaultSparked deepen trust on top of the new pathway rails.
[SIL:2⛔] Genius Hit List as scheduled audit — still open; elevate it into the next working session if no other blocked dependency clears first.
next: [SIL] CSP propagation script — `scripts/propagate-csp.mjs` created; single CSP_VALUE constant at top propagates to all HTML files via `node scripts/propagate-csp.mjs` (S47)
[SIL] Staging smoke test script — `scripts/smoke-test.sh` created; 12 key URLs, exits non-zero on failure; enforces CANON-007 (S47)
[SIL] Light-mode screenshot smoke — `tests/light-mode-screenshots.spec.js` created; Chromium-only, 3 pages, forced light-mode via localStorage (S47)
[SIL] IGNIS delta field — `ignisScoreDelta` added to `PROJECT_STATUS.json`; closeout Step 8 updated to compute and write it (S47)
[SIL] Join form GA4 form_error — `form_error` gtag event added to vault access request catch handler in `join/index.html` (S50)
shipped: Public AI/pathways layer shipped — `assets/pathways-router.js` now renders constrained player / member / supporter / investor / lore-seeker entry paths on homepage, membership, VaultSparked, join, and invite; adaptive CTA copy now respects remembered pathway intent.

Related-content cohesion shipped — `assets/related-content.js` now adds shared “continue through the vault” rails across the same key public entry surfaces so users do not dead-end after the first conversion page.

Startup + verification tooling shipped — `scripts/startup-snapshot.mjs`, `scripts/verify-live-headers.mjs`, `cloudflare/deploy-worker-local.ps1`, `tests/intelligence-surfaces.spec.js`, and the `core` / `extended` local verify tiers were added; `prompts/start.md`, `package.json`, and `sw.js` were updated to recognize the new flow.

Annual honesty gate shipped — `/vaultsparked/` now tells the truth about annual checkout: pricing preview is visible, but checkout blocks cleanly until the actual annual Stripe plan keys exist instead of pretending the route is live.
